question: Will the price of West Texas Intermediate (WTI - Cushing) crude oil have increased by each resolution date listed below as compared to its value on 2025-12-21?
resolution_criteria:
Resolves to the value found at https://fred.stlouisfed.org/series/DCOILWTICO once the data is published.

The exact value on 2025-12-21 is unknown, but the most recent known value (as of 2025-12-11) was 59.040. (The latest value released in Crude Oil Prices: West Texas Intermediate (WTI) - Cushing, Oklahoma from the release Spot Prices.)
background: The notes from the release: N/A.  The notes from the series: Definitions, Sources and Explanatory Notes (http://www.eia.doe.gov/dnav/pet/TblDefs/pet_pri_spt_tbldef2.asp).  Additional background of the series:  1. the units of the series: Dollars per Barrel.  2. the seasonal adjustments of the series:  Not Seasonally Adjusted  3. the update frequency: Daily
